forests.objective: Prepare a testing plan for the airplane portfolio scroll experience and wait for approval

procedure.summary: Comprehensive test plan for the Atlas Airfolio website, focusing on the airplane portfolio scroll experience, section readability, CTA visibility, and overall polish.
procedure.confirmMessage: All tests passed, indicating a polished and engaging user experience with the Atlas Airfolio website.

steps.action: Navigate to the Atlas Airfolio website.
Scroll down to the 'Launch Runway' section.
steps.assert: Element with text 'Launch Runway' is visible.

steps.action: Verify the airplane (#plane) motion is smooth and visually appealing during the scroll to 'Launch Runway'.
steps.assert: Airplane motion is smooth and visually appealing.

steps.action: Verify the 'Launch Runway' section is easily readable and understandable.
steps.assert: Section content is readable and understandable.

steps.action: Verify the 'Launch' link is visible and clickable within the 'Launch Runway' section.
Scroll down to the 'Cabin Systems' section.
steps.assert: Element with text 'Cabin Systems' is visible.

steps.action: Verify the airplane (#plane) motion is smooth and visually appealing during the scroll to 'Cabin Systems'.
steps.assert: Airplane motion is smooth and visually appealing.

steps.action: Verify the 'Cabin Systems' section is easily readable and understandable.
steps.assert: Section content is readable and understandable.

steps.action: Scroll down to the 'Atlas Stack' section.
steps.assert: Element with text 'Atlas Stack' is visible.

steps.action: Verify the airplane (#plane) motion is smooth and visually appealing during the scroll to 'Atlas Stack'.
steps.assert: Airplane motion is smooth and visually appealing.

steps.action: Verify the 'Atlas Stack' section is easily readable and understandable.
steps.assert: Section content is readable and understandable.

steps.action: Scroll down to the 'Landing Brief' section.
steps.assert: Element with text 'Landing Brief' is visible.

steps.action: Verify the airplane (#plane) motion is smooth and visually appealing during the scroll to 'Landing Brief'.
steps.assert: Airplane motion is smooth and visually appealing.

steps.action: Verify the 'Landing Brief' section is easily readable and understandable.
steps.assert: Section content is readable and understandable.

steps.action: Verify the 'Start the route' link is visible and clickable within the 'Landing Brief' section.
Scroll back to the top of the page.
steps.assert: Element with text 'Atlas Airfolio' is visible.

steps.action: Verify overall polish and visual appeal of the website.
steps.assert: Website exhibits a high level of polish and visual appeal.

notes: This test plan focuses on the core scrolling experience and section readability.
Pay close attention to the airplane's motion and ensure it doesn't feel jarring or unnatural.
Ensure all Call-To-Actions (CTAs) are clearly visible and easily accessible.
Consider testing on different screen sizes and browsers to ensure responsiveness.
The 'assert' values are guidelines; adjust them based on the specific implementation and expected behavior.
